steps.t: The cows were last seen at the little farm in Dunfast. You should search the small farm to see what became of the four cows.
One cow is missing from the farm that was overtaken by wolves. You should search near Dunfast for the missing cow.
The refugees' encampment can be found south-west of Dunfast. The cow can be summoned by whistling for her. You should lead the cow to the Dunfast refu…
Herethryth is at the Dunfast refugees' hideout in the Whitshaws.
